zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏空震荡整理
zh.content:
SOL/USD最新报79.79美元，24小时涨幅仅0.29%，整体维持窄幅震荡格局。从价格位置观察，现价低于20日均线81.357美元，显示短期趋势仍偏弱，多头反攻动能暂未形成有效突破。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为-0.6188，处于零轴下方，反映市场仍存在一定空头压力。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合价格持续运行于均线下方判断，市场情绪偏谨慎，短线以震荡偏空结构看待更为合理。

关键价位上，79.00美元附近构成首要支撑区域，若跌破可能进一步测试78.00美元关口。上方阻力首先关注80.00美元整数位，其后为20日均线所在的81.35美元区域，突破后有望改善短期技术形态。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可关注79.00美元附近的支撑表现，尝试低吸高抛的区间操作；稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新站稳81.35美元上方后再考虑顺势布局。若价格有效跌破79.00美元，应严格控制仓位并设置止损，以防空头趋势进一步扩大。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 79.79, remaining below its 20-period simple moving average at 81.36, which suggests the broader short-term trend is still tilted to the downside. Although the 24-hour gain of 0.29% indicates some stabilization, price action continues to struggle beneath dynamic resistance created by the moving average. The session range between 79.06 and 79.83 also reflects relatively subdued volatility, indicating that market participants are waiting for a stronger directional catalyst.

The negative MACD reading of -0.6188 points to lingering bearish momentum. While the signal line is unavailable, the MACD remaining below zero typically suggests sellers maintain a slight advantage. RSI data is not available, limiting confirmation of overbought or oversold conditions. However, the inability of price to reclaim the SMA(20) reinforces the view that bullish momentum remains weak until a sustained breakout above the moving average occurs.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the recent low at 79.06, followed by a stronger support zone around 78.00. A break below these levels could expose additional downside pressure toward the mid-77 region. On the upside, resistance is initially found near 80.00, with the more significant barrier at the SMA(20) around 81.36. A decisive move above this area would improve sentiment and potentially open the path toward 82.50–84.00.

Traders may consider a cautious approach while SOL remains below 81.36. Short-term bearish strategies could remain favorable on rallies toward resistance, provided risk is managed carefully with protective stops above key breakout levels. Conversely, bullish traders may prefer to wait for confirmation through a sustained close above the SMA(20), which would signal strengthening momentum. Range traders can monitor the 79.00–81.35 corridor, buying near support and reducing exposure near resistance until a clearer trend emerges.
